name: Local PDF Toolkit
description: All-in-One PDF Utility — 18 tools, 100% local, privacy-first, no uploads, CSP-compliant.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; worker-src 'self'
